summary: Research base for the differentiated Madoff angle (topic v002) is sufficient to begin scripting. Core facts (plea, sentence, mechanism, $65B vs $17.5B, whistleblower, collapse, death, recovery) are web-verified against primary (FBI/DOJ/trustee) and tier-1 sources. No critical claim is unsupported; two items need primary-detail confirmation before SCRIPT LOCK (not before drafting).
gaps_before_script_lock: SEC OIG report (OIG-509): lock exact Markopolos submission count/dates and the 2005 memo title (affects CLM-0005, CLM-0011).
Trustee/DOJ: confirm latest recovery totals and official $65B/$17.5B definitions (CLM-0004, CLM-0009).
Source 1-3 named institutional victims, neutral framing (CLM-0008).
Confirm exact wording of the 11 criminal counts (CLM-0001).
rights_safety_notes: Defendant deceased (R1); adjudicated facts stateable plainly.
Non-defendants (sons, whistleblower, SEC staff, victims) neutral, role-based; no implied crimes beyond record.
OIG finding = failure/incompetence, NOT corruption; do not allege bribery.
Red-flag framing is educational, not investment advice; disclaimer required.
All visuals symbolic/faceless, no real-person likeness; no pink.
